meta.title: TGIS | Randomtrip
meta.description: Thank God It's Sunday: one night, one dinner, and one surprise local experience close to home.
meta.openGraphDescription: Join the TGIS waitlist and get notified before checkout opens every Sunday.

hero.title: TGIS
hero.subtitle:
THANK GOD
IT'S SUNDAY
hero.tagline: 1 NIGHT, 1 DINNER and 1 LOCAL EXPERIENCE less than 300km from home.
hero.availabilityNote: Only 10 spots released every Sunday per country.
hero.errorMessage: We could not add you to the list. Please try again.
hero.successMessage: You are on the list. We will notify you before the next opening.
hero.helper: We will notify you 10 minutes before checkout opens every Sunday. Blink, and you are out.

items.title: The Alert
items.description:
On Sunday at 6:00 PM, you receive the hidden access.
You have 4 hours to book one of 10 limited escapes at a fixed price of $250 USD per person.

items.title: Reveal at your pace
items.description: You control the wonder. Exactly 48 hours before, we send you the driving distance and weather so you can prep the car and pack your bag. The secret coordinates are unlocked: you can see them that Thursday, or keep the intrigue alive and open the map right before leaving on Saturday.

items.title: The escape
items.description: On Saturday, you take your car. You arrive at a destination less than 300km from home. It includes the hotel night, Saturday dinner, Sunday breakfast, and a curated local experience.

countdown.title: BUY YOUR
countdown.subtitle: Subscribe to the waitlist — don't miss yours.
countdown.openSubtitle: The gateway is open. Only a few spots left.

testimonials.title: THE VERDICT
testimonials.subtitle: Your next TGIS is just one click away. Stop overthinking it.

dropGrid.title: ESCAPE LOG BY
dropGrid.description: What others lived. What you could live.

xsedHero.title: NEXT SUNDAY, A FEW WILL ESCAPE THE ROUTINE. WILL YOU BE ONE OF THEM?
xsedHero.helper: We'll notify you 10 minutes before the gateway opens every Sunday. Blink and you're out.
xsedHero.submitLabel: NOTIFY ME OF THE NEXT DROP
xsedHero.submitAriaLabel: Notify me of the next TGIS drop
xsedHero.successMessage: YOU'RE ON OUR LIST! YOU'LL RECEIVE THE NEXT DROP BEFORE IT GOES PUBLIC.
xsedHero.errorMessage: We couldn't add you. Please try again.

faq.title: TOP QUESTIONS
faq.description: Over 1,000 Trippers sharing experiences! Discover exclusive trips, curated within 300km of your home.

items.question: What day does my escape start?
items.answer: Your TGIS escape starts on Saturday. You'll receive instructions on Thursday, 48 hours in advance.

items.question: Can I choose the type of place? (Beach, Hotel, Cabin)
items.answer: You can indicate general preferences in the brief (nature, city, coast), but the exact destination is always a curated surprise.

items.question: What if I need to change the date?
items.answer: You can reschedule up to 7 days before your TGIS. Contact support and we'll move your spot to the next available drop.

items.question: What's included?
items.answer: Includes 1 night accommodation, Saturday dinner, Sunday breakfast, and a curated local experience. Transportation to the destination is not included.

hero.title: FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS
hero.description: Everything you need to know before taking the leap.

meta.title: FAQ | Randomtrip
meta.description: Everything you need to know before taking the leap: how it works, what's included and how to reschedule your surprise trip.
meta.openGraphDescription: We answer everything: how the surprise trip works, what you can choose and how to reschedule.

block.title: Featured questions
block.description: Everything you need to know before taking the leap.

items.question: How do I take the first step for my surprise trip?
items.answer: Fill out a 3-minute brief with your preferences and limits. From there, your Tripper designs a tailored experience revealed on drop day.

items.question: What can I choose?
items.answer: You choose the travel style, date range, budget and your no-go's. Destination and logistics stay in our hands.

items.question: What happens if I need to change the date?
items.answer: You can reschedule up to 72 hours in advance at no charge. Later changes are subject to Tripper availability.

items.question: What's included?
items.answer: Accommodation, curated activities and logistical support. Flights or transfers from your origin are arranged separately.

items.question: How do you design my trip?
items.answer: Your Tripper combines your brief with their destination knowledge to build an itinerary with rhythm, surprise and emotional coherence.

excuses.title: Get Lost
excuses.description: Tune out the noise, walk with no rush, and let the destination speak softly.

excuses.title: Inner journey
excuses.description: Turn inward with practices that settle mind and body on the road.

excuses.title: Adventure & challenge
excuses.description: Raise the stakes: land, water, or height to feel fully alive.

excuses.title: Cultural exploration
excuses.description: Cities, museums, and daily life—understanding a place from within.

excuses.title: Photography & visual storytelling
excuses.description: Frame the trip: landscape, street, wildlife, or altitude to tell your story.

excuses.title: Literature, art & local workshops
excuses.description: Books, murals, and hands-on making—reading and shaping the destination.

excuses.title: Music & sound
excuses.description: Listen to the trip: local scenes, traditional rhythms, and nights that ring.

excuses.title: Tribe encounters
excuses.description: Cross paths with fellow travelers: cool hostels, outings, and shared tables.

excuses.title: Romantic Getaway
excuses.description: A short trip—enough to tune out the world and tune into each other.

excuses.title: Adventure as a Couple
excuses.description: Discover places together that challenge and bring you closer.

excuses.title: Romantic Getaway
excuses.description: A short trip—enough to tune out the world and tune into each other.

excuses.title: Adventure Duo
excuses.description: Nothing brings you closer than getting lost in nature and conquering the unexpected together.

excuses.title: Foodie Lovers
excuses.description: For those who believe love also enters through the palate.

excuses.title: Culture & Tradition
excuses.description: The charm of discovering towns, stories, and local customs together.

excuses.title: Celebrations
excuses.description: An anniversary, a milestone, or simply the perfect excuse to toast together.

excuses.title: Beach & Dunes
excuses.description: Sun, sand, and the eternal excuse to walk hand in hand at sunset.

excuses.title: Urban Getaway
excuses.description: Because the city can also be the best setting to get lost as a couple.

excuses.title: Family Adventure
excuses.description: Create unforgettable memories for the whole family.

excuses.title: Family adventure
excuses.description: Cousins, siblings, aunts, uncles, grandparents—one trip, countless stories.

excuses.title: Nature & wildlife
excuses.description: Reserves, sightings, and quiet moments that feel like shared adventure.

excuses.title: Culture & traditions
excuses.description: Festivals, crafts, and customs lived together—not just photographed.

excuses.title: Beaches & dunes
excuses.description: Sand, wind, and sunsets: the group trip that never goes out of style.

excuses.title: Graduations & celebrations
excuses.description: Graduation, milestone birthdays, or “we finally got everyone together”—perfect excuse to travel.

excuses.title: Parent–child getaways
excuses.description: One-on-one time with your son or daughter: hobbies, laughter, and memories for life.

excuses.title: Luxury Honeymoon
excuses.description: The perfect start to your life together with unique experiences.

excuses.title: Adventure with Pets
excuses.description: Include your furry best friend in the adventure.

solo-get-lost.label: Quiet nature
solo-get-lost.desc: Forests, valleys, and viewpoints where silence is part of the plan.

solo-get-lost.label: Digital detox
solo-get-lost.desc: A real break from notifications—the world can wait.

solo-get-lost.label: Minimal retreat
solo-get-lost.desc: Essential spaces, few things, and mental clarity.

solo-get-lost.label: Slow trails
solo-get-lost.desc: Walk without a clock—you set the pace.

solo-busqueda-interior.label: Meditation & mindfulness
solo-busqueda-interior.desc: Breath, presence, and pauses that change the trip’s rhythm.

solo-busqueda-interior.label: Journaling & writing
solo-busqueda-interior.desc: Notebook, coffee, and space to sort what’s on your mind.

solo-busqueda-interior.label: Yoga & movement
solo-busqueda-interior.desc: Active body, lighter mind—sun salutations anywhere.

solo-busqueda-interior.label: Local wisdom
solo-busqueda-interior.desc: Teachers, rituals, and teachings rooted in the place.

solo-aventura-desafio.label: Trekking & hiking
solo-aventura-desafio.desc: Peaks, huts, and days that demand—and reward—you.

solo-aventura-desafio.label: Water adventure

solo-aventura-desafio.label: Extreme sports
solo-aventura-desafio.desc: Measured adrenaline for travelers who don’t go to sleep early.

solo-aventura-desafio.label: Unexplored terrain
solo-aventura-desafio.desc: Less-marked routes—the map still has blank edges.

solo-exploracion-cultural.label: Cities & architecture
solo-exploracion-cultural.desc: Neighborhoods, façades, and squares that tell centuries in one walk.

solo-exploracion-cultural.label: Museums & heritage
solo-exploracion-cultural.desc: Collections and sites that deserve time, not just a photo.

solo-exploracion-cultural.label: Local markets
solo-exploracion-cultural.desc: Tastes, smells, and chats with the people who keep the barrio alive.

solo-exploracion-cultural.label: Festivities & rituals
solo-exploracion-cultural.desc: Living calendar: fairs, celebrations, and customs that welcome you.

solo-fotografia-narrativa-visual.label: Landscapes & panoramas
solo-fotografia-narrativa-visual.desc: Wide horizons and light that asks for a tripod or patience.

solo-fotografia-narrativa-visual.label: Street photography
solo-fotografia-narrativa-visual.desc: People, gestures, and corners the guidebook skips.

solo-fotografia-narrativa-visual.label: Fauna & wildlife
solo-fotografia-narrativa-visual.desc: Wildlife with respect—long lens or binoculars.

solo-fotografia-narrativa-visual.label: Drone & heights
solo-fotografia-narrativa-visual.desc: Views from above when rules and safety allow.

solo-literatura-arte-talleres.label: Creative workshops

solo-literatura-arte-talleres.label: Literary routes
solo-literatura-arte-talleres.desc: Places that were already a scene in a novel or poem.

solo-literatura-arte-talleres.label: Urban art
solo-literatura-arte-talleres.desc: Murals, alt galleries, and local signatures.

solo-literatura-arte-talleres.label: Craft & design
solo-literatura-arte-talleres.desc: Objects with story and trades that teach the soul of a place.

solo-musica-sonidos.label: Local scenes
solo-musica-sonidos.desc: Bars, peñas, and venues where the sound feels real.

solo-musica-sonidos.label: Traditional rhythms
solo-musica-sonidos.desc: Folklore, instruments, and dances that carry identity.

solo-musica-sonidos.label: Festivals
solo-musica-sonidos.desc: Festival calendar to plan the escape around the lineup.

solo-musica-sonidos.label: Jam sessions
solo-musica-sonidos.desc: Improv with strangers who become part of the trip.

solo-tribe-encounters.label: Boutique hostels
solo-tribe-encounters.desc: Design, community, and spaces to meet like-minded travelers.

solo-tribe-encounters.label: Traveler meetups
solo-tribe-encounters.desc: Events and meetups to swap tips and routes.

solo-tribe-encounters.label: Group excursions
solo-tribe-encounters.desc: Day trips with a crew—company when you want it, freedom after.

solo-tribe-encounters.label: Community dining
solo-tribe-encounters.desc: Long tables, shared menus, and talk with someone from another continent.

escapada-romantica.desc: Walk hand in hand through places that tell stories you don't know yet.

escapada-romantica.label: Gastronomy & Wine Experiences
escapada-romantica.desc: Love is also tasted at the table: flavors, glasses, and laughter for two.

escapada-romantica.label: Sunsets & Intimate Moments
escapada-romantica.desc: The simple that becomes eternal: gazing at each other in silence before a shared horizon.

duo-aventura.label: Trekking & Nature
duo-aventura.desc: Climb together, discover together, conquer together.

duo-aventura.label: Water Adventure
duo-aventura.desc: Rivers, lakes, or seas: let the current and shared adrenaline carry you.

duo-aventura.label: Wildlife Exploration
duo-aventura.desc: The thrill of observing wildlife as privileged witnesses.

duo-aventura.label: Desert & Dunes
duo-aventura.desc: The golden vastness where every step is an act of complicity.

foodie-lovers.label: Cooking Workshops & Experiences
foodie-lovers.desc: Cook together: a fun chaos that turns into complicity.

foodie-lovers.label: Street Food & Markets
foodie-lovers.desc: Discover the soul of a place in a single street bite.

foodie-lovers.label: Fine Dining & Gourmet Experiences
foodie-lovers.desc: A table where every dish becomes part of the celebration.

foodie-lovers.label: Wine Routes & Wineries
foodie-lovers.desc: Toast in landscapes that taste of history and terroir.

cultura-tradicion.label: Museums & Heritage
cultura-tradicion.desc: Art and history as an excuse to walk more slowly.

cultura-tradicion.label: Towns & Walks
cultura-tradicion.desc: Small streets, big stories: the charm of the everyday.

cultura-tradicion.label: Crafts & Local Design
cultura-tradicion.desc: Objects that tell handcrafted stories, to take with you.

cultura-tradicion.label: Local Festivals
cultura-tradicion.desc: The magic of sharing customs lived with collective joy.

wellness-retreat.label: Spa & Hot Springs
wellness-retreat.desc: Water, calm, and the luxury of having nothing else to do.

wellness-retreat.label: Yoga & Mindfulness
wellness-retreat.desc: Breathe in unison and reconnect with your shared essence.

wellness-retreat.label: Silent Nature
wellness-retreat.desc: The power of listening to the forest in silence, together.

wellness-retreat.label: Detox / Retox / Repeat
wellness-retreat.desc: Self-care as a shared ritual: what goes in nourishes body and bond.

celebraciones.label: Anniversary Getaway
celebraciones.desc: A trip that celebrates time together, with new memories to add.

celebraciones.label: Milestones & Achievements
celebraciones.desc: Because life's big steps deserve more than a toast—they deserve a trip.

celebraciones.label: City Lights
celebraciones.desc: Rooftops, neon, and the vibe of a night remembered forever.

celebraciones.label: Evenings with Music

meta.description: How Randomtrip uses cookies and similar technologies on our website and services.
meta.title: Cookie Policy | Randomtrip

hero.description: Transparency about cookies and your choices.
hero.title: Cookie Policy

sections.title: What this policy covers
paragraphs: This Cookie Policy explains how Randomtrip (we, us) uses cookies and similar technologies when you visit our website, use our journey flow, sign in, or complete a purchase. It should be read together with our Privacy Policy.

sections.title: What cookies are
paragraphs: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a site. They help the site remember your session, preferences, and (where applicable) analytics. Similar technologies include local storage and pixels used for the same purposes.

sections.title: Cookies we use
sections.listIntro: Depending on how you use Randomtrip, we may use:
listItems: Strictly necessary cookies: required for security, authentication, session continuity, load balancing, and fraud prevention (for example keeping you signed in or remembering your locale).
Functional cookies: remember choices such as language, journey progress where designed into the product, and UI preferences.
Analytics cookies: help us understand aggregate usage (pages viewed, funnels, errors) so we can improve performance and content. Where required by law, we only enable these with your consent.
Payment-related cookies or storage: our payment provider (e.g. Mercado Pago) may set their own cookies or tokens when you pay; those are governed by their policies.

sections.title: Third parties
paragraphs: We may use subprocessors for hosting, analytics, authentication, email, or payments. They may set their own cookies. We choose providers with appropriate safeguards and describe the main categories in our Privacy Policy.

sections.title: How long cookies last
paragraphs: Session cookies expire when you close your browser. Persistent cookies remain for a defined period (for example 30 days or 12 months) depending on their purpose. Authentication tokens follow security best practices and may refresh or expire automatically.

sections.title: Managing cookies
paragraphs: You can block or delete cookies through your browser settings. Blocking strictly necessary cookies may break sign-in, checkout, or locale selection. Where we show a cookie banner or preference center, you can adjust non-essential categories in line with applicable law.

sections.title: Updates
paragraphs: We may update this Cookie Policy when we change technologies or legal requirements. The date of the latest revision is reflected when we publish changes on this page; continued use after updates means you acknowledge the revised policy where permitted by law.

contactBlock.title: Questions
contactBlock.before: For privacy-related questions, see our Privacy Policy or reach us via

meta.description: How Randomtrip collects, uses, and protects your personal data when you plan and book surprise trips.
meta.openGraphDescription: Privacy policy for Randomtrip travelers and trippers.
meta.title: Privacy Policy | Randomtrip

hero.description: Your privacy matters when you trust us with your trip.
hero.title: Privacy Policy

sections.title: Who we are
paragraphs: Randomtrip operates a platform that connects travelers with independent trip curators (Trippers) who design and deliver surprise-travel experiences. This policy describes how we process personal data in that context.

sections.title: Data we collect
listItems: Account data: name, email, password hash, profile details you choose to provide, and authentication identifiers from providers such as Google when you use social login.
Trip and journey data: traveler type, preferences, dislikes, budget signals, dates, party size, accessibility notes, and messages you send through the product.
Transaction data: purchases, payment status, references from Mercado Pago or other processors (we do not store full card numbers on our servers).
Technical data: IP address, device type, browser, approximate location from IP, logs, and cookies as described in our Cookie Policy.
Communications: support tickets, emails, and in-app messages.

sections.title: How we use data
listItems: Provide the service: run the journey flow, match you with experiences, and enable Trippers to prepare itineraries.
Process payments and prevent fraud.
Improve the product: analytics, debugging, and research in aggregate or de-identified form where possible.
Communicate with you: confirmations, service messages, and (where allowed) marketing with opt-out.
Comply with law and enforce our Terms.

sections.title: Legal bases (where applicable)
paragraphs: Depending on your region, we rely on contractual necessity (providing the service you request), legitimate interests (security, analytics, product improvement balanced against your rights), consent (cookies or marketing where required), and legal obligations.

sections.title: Sharing with Trippers and partners
paragraphs: To deliver your trip, we share relevant brief details with the Tripper or operators fulfilling the experience. We use infrastructure, payment, email, and analytics vendors as subprocessors under contracts with confidentiality and security requirements. We do not sell your personal data.

sections.title: International transfers
paragraphs: Your data may be processed in countries where we or our providers operate. Where required, we use appropriate safeguards such as standard contractual clauses or equivalent mechanisms.

sections.title: Retention
paragraphs: We keep data only as long as needed for the purposes above, including legal, tax, and dispute resolution retention periods. Account data is removed or anonymized when no longer required, subject to applicable law.

sections.title: Security
paragraphs: We implement technical and organizational measures designed to protect personal data. No method of transmission over the Internet is 100% secure; we encourage strong passwords and protecting your devices.

sections.title: Your rights
sections.listIntro: Depending on applicable law, you may have rights to access, rectify, delete, restrict, or port your data, and to object to certain processing. You may also withdraw consent where processing is consent-based. To exercise rights, contact us via the details below.
listItems: You can update parts of your profile in the app where self-service is available.
You may lodge a complaint with your local data protection authority.

sections.title: Children
paragraphs: Randomtrip is not directed at children under 16 (or the age required in your jurisdiction). We do not knowingly collect data from children. Contact us if you believe a minor provided data so we can delete it.

sections.title: Changes
paragraphs: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will post the revised version on this page and, where appropriate, notify you by email or in-product notice.

contactBlock.title: Contact
contactBlock.before: Questions about privacy? Reach us through
contactBlock.after: and we will respond within a reasonable time.

meta.description: Refunds, cancellations, and chargebacks for Randomtrip purchases and surprise-travel experiences.
meta.openGraphDescription: Refund and cancellation policy for Randomtrip.
meta.title: Refund Policy | Randomtrip

hero.description: How refunds and cancellations work for trips purchased through Randomtrip.
hero.title: Refund Policy

sections.title: Overview
paragraphs: This Refund Policy explains how cancellation, refunds, and payment disputes work when you purchase experiences through Randomtrip. Specific offers may include additional terms shown at checkout; where they conflict, the checkout terms control for that purchase.

sections.title: Nature of the service
paragraphs: Many Randomtrip experiences are customized or date-specific (travel services, reservations, or curator time). Once key components are committed with suppliers, refunds may be limited. The surprise element does not remove your statutory consumer rights where they apply.

sections.title: Cancellations by you
listItems: Request cancellation as early as possible through the contact or support channel indicated in your confirmation or account.
Whether a full refund, partial refund, or credit applies depends on how far in advance you cancel, the Tripper's policy, and supplier non-refundable costs.
If no travel has been booked yet and the Tripper cancels without cost to them, we will aim to refund payment method charges minus any explicitly non-refundable fees stated at purchase.

sections.title: Changes or cancellations by the Tripper or Randomtrip
paragraphs: If a Tripper cannot deliver the experience due to force majeure, supplier failure, or operational reasons, we will offer a rescheduled date, a comparable alternative where feasible, or a refund of amounts paid for the undelivered portion, consistent with applicable law and the terms of sale.

sections.title: Failed or reversed payments
paragraphs: If Mercado Pago or your bank declines or reverses a charge, access to the purchased experience may be suspended until payment is successfully completed. Duplicate charges or processor errors should be reported to us and to the payment provider.

sections.title: Chargebacks
paragraphs: Please contact us before initiating a chargeback so we can resolve billing issues. Unwarranted chargebacks may result in account restrictions and may not reflect the outcome of a good-faith cancellation discussion.

sections.title: Processing time
paragraphs: Approved refunds are processed to the original payment method where possible. Timing depends on Mercado Pago or your bank (often several business days after we issue the refund).

sections.title: Statutory rights
paragraphs: Nothing in this policy limits mandatory consumer rights in your country (including cooling-off rules where they apply to distance contracts). If you believe a statutory right applies, tell us and we will review your case.

contactBlock.title: Need help with a refund?
contactBlock.after: with your order reference and we will guide you.

meta.description: Terms of Service for using Randomtrip to discover and book surprise-travel experiences.
meta.title: Terms of Service | Randomtrip

hero.description: Rules for using our platform, booking trips, and working with Trippers.
hero.title: Terms of Service

sections.title: Agreement
paragraphs: By accessing or using Randomtrip websites, apps, or services (the Services), you agree to these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, do not use the Services. We may update these Terms; the updated version will be posted here, and continued use may constitute acceptance as allowed by law.

sections.title: What Randomtrip provides
paragraphs: Randomtrip is a marketplace and technology layer that helps travelers express preferences and book surprise-travel experiences curated by independent Trippers. Unless stated otherwise, Trippers are responsible for designing and delivering the travel experience; Randomtrip facilitates discovery, booking, communication, and payment processing.

sections.title: Eligibility and accounts
listItems: You are legally able to enter a binding contract in your jurisdiction.
Registration information is accurate and kept up to date.
You are responsible for safeguarding your password and for activity under your account.
You will notify us promptly of unauthorized access.

sections.title: Bookings, prices, and payments
listItems: Prices are displayed in the currency shown at checkout unless stated otherwise.
Payment is processed by Mercado Pago or another processor we designate; their terms and privacy policy also apply.
You authorize us and our payment partners to charge your selected payment method for the total shown, including applicable taxes and fees when quoted.
Trip details, blackout dates, inclusions, and exclusions are described in the offer or confirmation. The surprise destination model means some specifics are revealed according to the product rules.

sections.title: Traveler conduct
listItems: Use the Services for unlawful, harassing, or discriminatory purposes.
Attempt to scrape, hack, reverse engineer, or overload our systems.
Circumvent payments, fees, or identity checks.
Misrepresent health, safety, or accessibility needs in a way that endangers you, Trippers, or third parties.
Resell or commercially exploit listings without authorization.

sections.title: Trippers and third parties
paragraphs: Trippers and local operators are independent parties. Randomtrip does not control every on-the-ground decision. Their performance is their responsibility subject to our Tripper agreements and consumer law. Carriers, hotels, and activity providers may have their own terms and conditions of carriage or stay.

sections.title: Intellectual property
paragraphs: Content on the Services (brand, design, text, graphics, video, software) is owned by Randomtrip or licensors. You receive a limited, non-exclusive license to use the Services for personal, non-commercial trip planning unless we agree otherwise in writing.

sections.title: Disclaimers
paragraphs: Travel involves inherent risks. The Services are provided as is and as available to the fullest extent permitted by law. We do not guarantee uninterrupted access or that every trip will match subjective expectations of surprise, though we strive for high quality. Maps, photos, and descriptions are illustrative.

sections.title: Limitation of liability
paragraphs: To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, Randomtrip and its affiliates are not liable for indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, or for lost profits, data, or goodwill. Our aggregate liability arising out of these Terms or the Services is limited to the amount you paid for the specific booking giving rise to the claim in the twelve (12) months before the event, except where liability cannot be limited by law (including gross negligence or willful misconduct).

sections.title: Indemnity
paragraphs: You will indemnify and hold harmless Randomtrip from claims, damages, losses, and expenses (including reasonable legal fees) arising from your misuse of the Services, violation of these Terms, or violation of third-party rights.

sections.title: Suspension and termination
paragraphs: We may suspend or terminate access for breach of these Terms, risk, fraud, or legal requirements. You may stop using the Services at any time. Provisions that by nature should survive (liability limits, indemnity, governing law) survive termination.

sections.title: Governing law and disputes
paragraphs: Unless mandatory consumer rules in your country require otherwise, these Terms are governed by the laws applicable to Randomtrip's operating entity without regard to conflict-of-law rules. Courts or arbitration in that jurisdiction may have exclusive venue, except where consumers have non-waivable rights to sue in their home courts.

cta.buttonAriaLabel: Go to 'Start your Journey' section with 'By Traveller' tab selected
cta.subtitle: Start with a feelings brief. It takes 3 minutes.
cta.title: Ready to let go of control and gain freedom?

items.bio: Designs the vision of Randomtrip: turning the surprise into a reliable, operable experience with soul.
items.name: Santiago Senega

items.bio: Builds the systems that make it possible to scale serendipity without losing clarity, speed, or premium experience.
items.name: David Ortega

items.bio: Shapes the visual universe of Randomtrip, making sure every interaction feels clear, human, and memorable.
items.name: Carla C. J Vázquez

curators.subtitle: We are a team of product, technology, operations, design and curation with a travel category: Controlled Wonder. We are not a traditional agency or OTA. We are a managed marketplace of surprise experiences, where every route combines human sensibility, operational technology, and local knowledge. The promise is simple: the destination can surprise you; the experience should not worry you.

faq.description: Everything you need to know before taking the leap.

items.question: How do I take the first step for my surprise trip?
items.answer: Fill out a 3-minute brief with your preferences and limits. From there, your Tripper designs a tailored experience revealed on drop day.

items.question: What can I choose?
items.answer: You choose the travel style, date range, budget and your no-go's. Destination and logistics stay in our hands.

items.question: What happens if I need to change the date?
items.answer: You can reschedule up to 72 hours in advance at no charge. Later changes are subject to Tripper availability.

items.question: What's included?
items.answer: Accommodation, curated activities and logistical support. Flights or transfers from your origin are arranged separately.

items.question: How do you design my trip?
items.answer: Your Tripper combines your brief with their destination knowledge to build an itinerary with rhythm, surprise and emotional coherence.

faq.title: Featured questions

founder.p1: Randomtrip was born from a personal obsession of Santi Senega: to give travel back that mix of curiosity, wonder, and trust that is often lost among endless options, reviews, and logistical decisions.
founder.p2: As Founder & CEO, Santi designed Randomtrip from a simple idea: the surprise can be deeply exciting if it's well contained. The destination can remain hidden; the price, quality, operation, and support cannot. That tension between mystery and structure became the heart of Randomtrip: Designed Serendipity, or living the unexpected without improvising.

hero.subtitle: At Randomtrip the surprise is the destination, not the quality, price, or logistics. We combine technology, human curation, and local expertise to create trips with soul — safe and memorable.
hero.title: About Us

meta.description: Learn about the philosophy, founder story and curating team behind Randomtrip. Designed serendipity with safety and impeccable taste.
meta.openGraphDescription: Learn about the philosophy, founder story and curating team behind Randomtrip.
meta.openGraphTitle: About us | Randomtrip — Architecture of trust
meta.title: About us | Randomtrip — Architecture of trust

philosophy.p1: We don't sell destinations. We design a different way of traveling. Randomtrip was born to free travelers from the fatigue of planning: too many open tabs, too many decisions before you even start.
philosophy.p2: Our answer is Designed Serendipity: experiences that feel spontaneous but are born from a rigorous structure. You define dates, budget, style, pace, and limits. We design the wonder within that framework. Living the unexpected, without improvising.

items.title: You set the limits
items.description: Tell us when you travel, how much you want to invest, what style you're looking for, and what you don't want.

items.title: We curate the route
items.description: We cross your signals with local expertise, real availability, provider quality, and operational logic.

items.title: We reveal just enough
items.description: You receive key information at the right moment. The surprise remains; trust is never lost.

items.title: Clear pricing
items.description: We define budget and conditions before designing. No microextras disguised as surprises.

items.title: Validated providers
items.description: We work with accommodations, experiences, and operators aligned with quality, safety, and service.

items.title: Reveal with support
items.description: The destination is revealed on time, with practical information and guidance so you just have to live it.

items.title: Expert curation
items.copy: Less searching, more traveling. We design every route with local expertise, real preferences, and our own methodology.

items.title: Safety and transparency
items.copy: The surprise is never where it matters: budget, limits, logistics, providers, and support are all clear from the start.

items.title: Tripper community
items.copy: Our Trippers aren't campaign influencers. They are local curators and partners who turn territorial knowledge into Routes with Soul.

form.tripperNotePlaceholder: Anything the reviewer should know — special requests, context on pricing, timing constraints…
form.tripperNoteHint: Visible to the admin reviewing this experience.
form.submitConfirmBody: Your experience will be locked while the admin reviews it. Add anything they should know.

substeps.title: Experience
substeps.description: Name, type, level, and who can take the experience.

substeps.title: Destination
substeps.description: City, country and what's the excuse.

substeps.title: Logistics & accommodation
substeps.description: Hotels, stays and suggested days. If you leave it empty, Randomtrip will find the best option.

substeps.title: Activities
substeps.description: Suggested activities

substeps.title: Itinerary
substeps.description: Per day, avoid phrases that sound like a "tourist trip" such as: unique postcards, dream destinations, all inclusive, among others.

fields.title: Title
fields.teaserHint: Short description shown on cards (max 150 characters)
fields.excuseKeyHint: The excuse the client uses to justify the trip
fields.basePriceHint: Price per person, in the configured currency
fields.displayPriceHint: Free text shown on the public card. E.g.: From USD 450
fields.seasonHint: Recommended months to take the trip
fields.pricingDescription: Suggested providers, costs and season recommendation.
fields.compatibilityHint: These fields help the matching algorithm pair your package with client requests.
fields.activityDurationPlaceholder: E.g.: 3 hrs. at a relaxed pace
fields.activityDescPlaceholder: E.g.: during the activity you will be able to ride a horse.....
fields.itineraryTitlePlaceholder: E.g.: first day on the hill
fields.itineraryDescPlaceholder: E.g.: on the first day we went to the hill called "Viva lava"
fields.heroImageHint: Main image displayed on the experience card
fields.copyrightHint: Only use images you own or are licensed to use.
fields.slugHint: Used in the public URL. Letters, numbers and dashes only.
fields.createBlogPostHint: A draft will be created with the experience content

review.pendingBody: Your experience is under review. You cannot make changes until you receive a response.

hero.title: Contact

intro.title: Let's talk
intro.p1: Do you have any question about your next Randomtrip or how our surprise trips work?
intro.p2: Complete the form or email us directly at hola@randomtrip.com
intro.p3: Interested in collaborating with Randomtrip or exploring advertising or partnership opportunities?
intro.p4: We'd love to hear from you. Email us at partnerships@randomtrip.com.
